safe_claim_ceiling: ZLAR can govern Codex CLI-invoked MCP tool calls when those MCP servers are routed through ZLAR.

surfaces.label: Codex CLI MCP tools/call through isolated routed profile
surfaces.boundary: Coverage is limited to Codex CLI MCP tools/call requests for the single scratch server routed through the ZLAR MCP gate.
surfaces.closure_mechanism: The scratch profile contains exactly one MCP server and that server is the ZLAR-routed proof server.

surfaces.label: Routed MCP allow decision evidence
surfaces.boundary: Allow decision evidence is limited to the supplied scratch routed MCP tools/call audit event.
surfaces.closure_mechanism: Routed decisions must have mcp-gate audit evidence and remain limited to the configured routed MCP server.

surfaces.label: Routed MCP deny decision evidence
surfaces.boundary: Deny decision evidence is limited to the supplied scratch routed MCP tools/call audit event.
surfaces.closure_mechanism: Blocked decisions must have mcp-gate audit evidence and no upstream execution evidence when the proof records that check.

surfaces.label: Direct upstream MCP registration bypass sentinel
surfaces.boundary: A direct upstream MCP server registration would bypass the routed MCP gate and is not accepted as coverage evidence.
surfaces.closure_mechanism: Reject registrations that reference the fake upstream command, upstream port, or upstream markers instead of the ZLAR route.

surfaces.label: /contest status
surfaces.closure_mechanism: No closure mechanism is claimed in v0.

surfaces.label: External verifier attestation status
surfaces.boundary: Disclosure only: external non-Vincent verifier attestation remains prepared/pending.
surfaces.closure_mechanism: No external attestation claim is made in v0.

surfaces.label: Codex shell surface
surfaces.boundary: Codex shell commands outside routed MCP tools/call decisions are outside this report.
surfaces.closure_mechanism: Requires a separate interception surface or deployment-layer control; it is not claimed by this routed MCP profile report.

surfaces.label: Codex model reasoning and final text
surfaces.boundary: Model reasoning, planning, memory, and final text are not an MCP tools/call action surface.
surfaces.closure_mechanism: Requires a separate interception surface or deployment-layer control; it is not claimed by this routed MCP profile report.

non_claims: This report covers routed or intercepted action surfaces only.
This report does not assert coverage for Codex shell, filesystem, browser, app-control, direct network, model reasoning, or final text surfaces.
MCP servers registered directly with a client instead of through the ZLAR MCP gate are outside this report.
External non-operator verifier attestation is not present in v0.
residual_ungoverned_surfaces: Codex shell commands outside routed MCP tools/call decisions
Codex filesystem changes outside routed MCP tools/call decisions
Codex browser actions outside routed MCP tools/call decisions
Codex desktop app-control actions outside routed MCP tools/call decisions
Codex direct network calls outside routed MCP tools/call decisions
Codex model reasoning and final text
MCP protocol messages other than tools/call decisions
MCP servers registered directly with the client instead of through the ZLAR MCP gate
